notes: Use your real model blend price for final finance reporting.
This model is intentionally transparent and reproducible from experiment artifacts.

human_story.headline: Borg is materially reducing agent effort per successful task.
proof_points: Average token use dropped from 2475 to 1200 per task in live A/B.
Average latency dropped from 49.5s to 24.0s per task in live A/B.
Completion improved from 35% to 100% in the measured sample.
Scale reliability gate is now passing at 100-user readiness thresholds.
human_story.for_humans: Yes, this is a good communication frame. Humans understand saved time, saved spend, and higher completion better than raw model internals.

caveats: 100-user load gate is now green in the latest gate snapshot.
Economic outputs should be computed with final production pricing assumptions.

next_actions: Keep value dashboard live and update daily from fresh experiment and gate snapshots.
Switch external messaging from 'in hardening' to '100-user gate passing' with linked proof artifacts.
Publish one discreet pilot report with before/after task-level savings evidence.
Move from scenario pricing to finance-approved effective token cost assumptions.
